Kanban — project status

Overview Architecture Identity Milestone Relevance & Libraries Canon Import Pending & Operations Kanban

Status as of 2026-06-21. "In progress" includes the autonomous work the system does for itself — the crawler never stops. Cards link the commit that shipped them where it helps. The continuous tasks have a live Grafana dashboard (LAN/Tailscale).

Done 19

Canon import — classics from open sources (C0–C4 + scheduling)

A back-catalogue path that doesn't wait on the MARC dump: Wikidata/award seed (canon_seed, CC0) → ISBN-13/title+author matcher → positive-only canon relevance boost (folded into the nightly recompute) → polite OPAC resolve that seeds held classics into the existing worker → Open Library ratings + curated award fallback. As of 2026-06-21 the pipeline is scheduled and live on the crawl plane (canon_seed monthly, canon_resolve 4-hourly) and bootstrapped in prod: ~1,210 seed works, 28 matched to holdings (~5.7%, all title+author). Two follow-ups also closed 2026-06-21: WDQS keyset pagination (seek by last work IRI, no more deep-OFFSET 504s capping the seed at ~500), the OL rating count wired into the canon boost, and a canon coverage row on the Grafana dashboard (seed size · % matched · % held · acquire-status · ratings). Full plan: Canon Import.

2026-06-21255e491…2d3ad86

Future-year pub_year fix

Browse was floating 2033/2029/2028 rows to the top (sorts by pub_year DESC). Capped the parser's plausibility band at the current year + 1 (was 2100), unified the ceiling into one shared helper, cleaned the existing bad rows in prod, and shipped end-to-end. New records can no longer store implausible future years.

2026-06-21057bc70…1caf751

Relevance milestone — Phase R (R0–R3)

Stored relevance_score ∈ [0,1] = demand (from the availability time-series) + holdings breadth + recency + display completeness, corpus-normalised (p95) with cold-start neutral demand and thin-history trend shrinkage. Recomputed nightly on the crawl plane (catalog relevance recompute, 04:00); now the default /browse sort and a filter-and-tiebreak in keyword/semantic/hybrid search. Live in prod: 43,412 records scored. External canon boost deferred to the back-catalogue.

2026-06-163aff42d…7f6e693

Crawl throughput — pooled browser session

One AsyncStealthySession (max_pages=1) now spans each discover/worker/refresh run instead of launching a browser per record — the launch, not the request, was the real cap under the 1 req/s budget. Politeness unchanged (single page, serial, throttle still gates every fetch). Crawler container rebuilt on the NAS to pick it up.

2026-06-13dbe7486

Catalog navigator — Tier A+B

/browse faceted explorer (author · genre · idioma · año · disponibilidad) + GET /catalog/browse with self-excluding facet counts + /catalog/authors; CDU-derived genre column, backfilled (migration 0013).

2026-06-1224d2b7e

Shelf re-import UX

Uploader collapses to a discreet «Re-importar» link once a shelf exists; re-imports upsert in place (pendiente → leyendo → leído), never duplicate — now pinned by an integration test.

2026-06-11d51248b

Hybrid search (RRF)

?mode=hybrid fuses FTS + BGE-M3 KNN (k=60, 50-candidate pools); degrades to keyword on embedder failure; three-way toggle in the UI.

2026-06-1195122e4

Post-identity follow-ups batch

Junta CC-BY attribution (footer/README/export) · schemathesis contract suite · otel-redis · rate limits on verify/reset · README refresh.

2026-06-111fc2c11

Identity milestone — Phases 0–5

Public registration (Argon2id, Redis sessions, Turnstile, Mailgun EU), per-user shelves, Dramatiq background imports, frontend auth + legal pages, user-scoped recommender, GDPR export/deletion + isolation suite.

2026-06-107992892…5ce696c

Project summary docs (this site)

Overview + architecture + identity + pending/ops pages; navigator requirement recorded; this board.

2026-06-10057af23

José's shelf re-imported

The post-truncation re-import is done; shelf lives under his account.

OPS2026-06-11

privacy@josearcos.me delivers

Verified end-to-end 2026-06-13: it had no Cloudflare Email Routing rule (mail hard-bounced 550). Added privacy@ → josearcoscampos@gmail.com, cleared the Mailgun bounce-suppression the failed test had created, and confirmed delivery (250 OK). The legal-page privacy contact now reaches a mailbox.

OPS2026-06-13
Earlier milestones (M0 → M6.5) — all shipped

M6.5 CI/CD auto-deploy

Green push to main → NAS; red never deploys.

M5 Recommender v1

Shipped as identity Phase 4 — per-user taste centroid + pgvector KNN, OpenRouter rationales.

2026-06-10

M4 Goodreads import

CSV importer, ISBN-13 + trigram matching, shelf UI.

2026-06-08

M3 Semantic search

BGE-M3 via HF Inference API, pgvector HNSW, similar-records.

2026-06-08

APM / OpenTelemetry

FastAPI + asyncpg (+ Redis since 2026-06-11) → Tempo + SigNoz.

2026-06-04

Autonomous crawler

On-NAS supercronic container; cursor-resumable discover/worker/refresh.

2026-06-03

M6 Public deploy

NAS + Cloudflare Tunnel, same-origin routing, backups.

2026-05-30

M0–M2.5 Foundations → covers

Scaffold + CI · catalogue ingest + FTS + literary scoping · availability time-series · covers pipeline.

In progress 3

Catalogue crawl (autonomous)

Novedades 2024+ window is caught up: ~54,030 records mirrored (2026-06-21) against a ~55–56k result set, so the resumable (@fepu>=2024) cursor has reached the end and the hourly bars are now a near-zero trickle of newly-catalogued arrivals — expected, not a break (a 2026-06-18 "imports stopped" scare turned out to be exactly this). The full ~2.66M TITN space stays the long game (the MARC dump closes it, not crawling). With novedades caught up there's spare OPAC budget, now partly used by the new canon_resolve job. Live progress: Grafana → biblioHack crawl & enrichment.

CONTINUOUS

Genre coverage (self-healing)

~5k records carry a real genre; the rest re-derive on re-scrape. Gotcha found 2026-06-12: the crawler container doesn't ride CD — it needed a manual --build to pick up genre derivation (done). Watch «% known by ingest day» on the dashboard to confirm new records arrive classified.

CONTINUOUS

Embedding backfill

BGE-M3 vectors via the HF Inference API, every 3h on the crawler plane — semantic/hybrid quality grows with the mirror.

CONTINUOUS

To do 13

Canon import — follow-ups

LibraryThing / OCLC ubiquity (optional)

The last canon-import item: a "held by N libraries" worldcat-style signal to deepen notability. Low priority — only if Wikidata + Open Library prove insufficient. (WDQS keyset pagination, the OL-ratings boost, and the Grafana coverage row all shipped 2026-06-21.)

DEFERRED
Ops — needs José

Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY on the NAS

Until it's in the prod .env, recommendation rationales silently stay empty (by design).

OPSQUICK
Next features (rough order)

MARC-dump request to the Junta (RBPA)

Email the RBPA coordinator for a periodic MARC-XML dump (Madrid precedent, CC-BY). One «sí» obsoletes ~90% of the crawl — bibliographic data arrives in bulk; only holdings/availability still need probing. Deploy-free, highest long-term leverage.

OPSQUICK

Demand-driven fetcher (unmatched shelf books)

Resolve unmatched Goodreads/StoryGraph shelf entries (and failed searches) via an OPAC title query → TITN → immediate ingest. ~5–10 requests per book — makes the catalogue feel complete for real users years before the full sweep finishes. Just another job on the existing gateway. The canon resolve job now does exactly this for classics; this card is the user-shelf variant, which can reuse the same resolve machinery.

MEDIUM

Search ⇄ browse cross-links

Natural follow-on to the navigator: clicking an author/genre badge on a search result or record page jumps into /browse pre-filtered; search box on /browse.

SMALL

StoryGraph CSV importer

Second Importer adapter; CSV shape close to Goodreads. Wait for a real user asking, or do it as the second-source proof.

SMALL

LLM query rewriting + cold-start classification

The two remaining OpenRouter jobs from §8.3. Needs the API key set first (see ops).

MEDIUM

OTel on the crawl/worker plane

When scrape_tasks/import_jobs status rows stop being enough; scrape_log remains unwired.

MEDIUM

Edge rate limiting (Cloudflare WAF)

App-level limits shipped in Phase 5; add edge rules if abuse actually appears.

IF NEEDED
Next milestones — designed 2026-06-15 (plan)

Libraries milestone (ships next)

Promote Branch to a user-facing entity (geo/address/url); users follow multiple branches by geolocation proximity (location client-side only). Hard-filter browse + search to «my libraries → province → full»; library-aware recommendations.

MILESTONE
Roadmap (bigger bets)

M7 — Other provinces (Sevilla, Cádiz…)

Config-driven SUBC scoping + crawl budget; copies are already stored network-wide. The natural next big milestone now that the app is multi-user.

MILESTONE

Navigator Tier C — author country

True nationality facet needs BNE/Wikidata authority enrichment; deferred until the mirror justifies it.

DEFERRED

M8 — Mobile app

React Native/Expo over the same API. Parked behind M7.

PARKED
Generated by tools/build_docs.py from the canonical Markdown in docs/ — do not edit the HTML by hand. · Overview · Información obtenida del Portal de la Junta de Andalucía.
